title: Manage The Day (MTD) – AI Productivity Platform
summary: A cross-platform AI productivity platform — a unified multi-provider calendar, a voice + text AI planning assistant, and live iOS Dynamic Island timers.
details: **Problem** — Productivity tools scatter the day across silos: tasks in one app; Google, Apple, Outlook and the phone's own calendar in others; goals nowhere at all. Planning means manually reconciling all of them.

**Solution** — A production-grade Flutter platform (iOS, Android, and Web from one codebase) that merges every calendar into a single schedule, organises work by life pillars, and adds a voice + text AI assistant that plans and auto-schedules.

**Unified multi-provider calendar** — one Syncfusion-based surface merging MTD, Google, Apple (CalDAV/iCloud), Microsoft 365, and on-device iOS (EventKit) events, with drag & drop, resizing, recurrence, and colour-coded cross-calendar sync.
**Voice + text AI assistant** — FastAPI + Google Agent Development Kit; manages tasks, events, goals, and pillars, and auto-schedules work onto the calendar from natural language.
**iOS Live Activities** — Dynamic Island and lock-screen timers for active focus sessions.
**Productivity system** — Task Cloud (kanban), Pillars, Goals, Projects, Focus Time, and day-tracking heatmaps.
**Architecture** — Flutter · Dart 3; global state via BLoC + Provider + Riverpod; Firebase Auth, Firestore, Storage & Analytics; FastAPI backend over REST (Dio).
**My role** — Lead Flutter engineer, from architecture through shipped product across mobile, web, backend, and applied AI.

title: Crooze – Fitness Challenge App
summary: A community fitness-challenge app — cycling and walking contests, leaderboards, and automated certificate generation.
details: **Product** — A community-driven fitness app where users join cycling, walking, and club challenges hosted by admins to earn rewards and certificates.
**Features I built** — Community, Club, and Individual challenge modules, a Leaderboard system, challenge-summary views, and automated certificate generation.
**Performance** — Integrated a GraphQL API for efficient, high-performance data retrieval, reducing over-fetching across challenge and profile screens.
**Stability** — Fixed crash loops, null-handling, and data-sync issues, and tuned overall app performance.
**My role** — Feature development and stabilisation as a Flutter engineer at The Internet Folks.

title: AgreEasy – B2B Agriculture Platform
summary: A multilingual B2B platform connecting farmers directly with hotels and restaurants for crop and produce trading.
details: **Product** — A B2B platform connecting farmers directly with hotels and restaurants for crop and produce trading.
**Modules I built** — Farmer Authentication, Profile Management, and Land Registration, end to end.
**Localization** — Added multilingual support to make the app inclusive for regional farmers.
**Reliability** — Optimised the issue-reporting/ticketing system, fixed notification bugs, and eliminated memory leaks for smoother state handling.
**My role** — Feature development as a Flutter engineer at The Internet Folks.

title: SimbaCourse – Education Management App
summary: A full-stack education-management platform for admins, teachers, and students — built from the data model to a shipped mobile app.
details: **Product** — An education-management platform connecting admins, teachers, and students end to end.
**Full stack** — Built both frontend and backend from scratch: Flutter for the mobile client, Express.js + MongoDB for the API.
**Features** — Course creation, enrolment, progress tracking, and in-app communication across all three roles.
**My role** — Full-stack engineer (SDE intern) at SimbaQuartz, from data model to shipped app.
